scripts.package-dev-deploy: gulp update-appSettings --env DEV && gulp increase-version && gulp clean && gulp bundle --production && gulp package-solution --production  && npm run deploy
scripts.package-int-deploy: gulp update-appSettings --env INT && gulp increase-version && gulp clean && gulp bundle --production && gulp package-solution --production  && npm run deploy
scripts.package-dev: gulp update-appSettings --env INT && gulp increase-version && gulp clean && gulp bundle --production && gulp package-solution --production
scripts.package-pre: gulp update-appSettings --env PREPRO && gulp increase-version && gulp bundle --production && gulp package-solution --production
scripts.package-pro: gulp update-appSettings --env PRO && gulp increase-version && gulp bundle --production && gulp package-solution --production
